docket_entries.description: SC-109(AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR) DAN MCDOWELL FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB,INC.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF REDDY, ARVIND
STIPULATION TO ALLOW CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY REDDY, ARVIND AIRBNB,INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REDDY, ARVIND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AIRBNB,INC. $1,500.08 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,605.08, THE AMOUNT OF $770 TO COVER THE 14 DAYS THE BATHROOM WAS UNUSABLE AND $730.08 TO COVER THE CANCELLATION FEE PLAINTIFF WAS CHARGED, FOR A TOTAL OF $1500.08 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $30. SERVED MAR-10-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB,INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-17-2023 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB,INC.
ORDER REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM PLAINTIFF DENIED**
ORDER REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM PLAINTIFF GARNTED**

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-17-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-17-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM GROVER. PLAINTIFF ARVIND REDDY IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT AIRBNB IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM APPEARANCE REPRESENTED BY DAN MCDOWELL. PARTIES EXCHANGED EXHIBITS. PARTIES ORALLY STIPULATE AND AUTHORIZED THE COURT TO SIGN THEIR NAMES ON THEIR BEHALF. DEFENDANT AND JUDGE PRO TEM AGREED TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO APPEAR VIA ZOOM. JUDGE PRO TEM ALLOWED PLAINTIFF TO ORALLY DECLARE HIS NEW MAILING ADDRESS. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY REDDY, ARVIND AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB,INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-17-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RECEIVED DEFENDANT EXHIBITS VIA MAIL
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB,INC.
DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF REDDY, ARVIND
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB,INC.
